notes: M4 - generations & polish. When you die, you can now continue as one of your children: your heir inherits a taxed share of the estate, and the family reshapes around them (your spouse becomes their parent, your other kids their siblings). Also: a bigger event catalog (~229 events), a balance pass that closes a repeatable-lottery exploit, a new 'Dynasty' achievement, and a generation counter on your Profile. Your existing v0.12.0 save carries forward.
